raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current footing","name":"What's feeling solid in your role right now, Toby?","description":"Opens with a calm read on where Toby feels grounded before moving into stretch.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visible stretch","name":"Where do you want your judgment to carry more weight in the design work?","description":"Surfaces the specific kind of influence Toby wants to grow into at lead level.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Named destination","name":"What kind of design work would make the next step feel real for you?","description":"Gets beyond abstract ambition into the concrete scope Toby wants next.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence target","name":"Where do you want your influence to reach beyond the design team?","description":"Probes the org-level reach Toby wants to build, especially across Product and Engineering.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision ownership","name":"Which decisions do you want to own end to end in the next stretch?","description":"Makes the decision-ownership gap concrete by asking for specific accountable decisions.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-team friction","name":"Where does cross-functional alignment slow your design recommendations down most?","description":"Surfaces the exact handoff or alignment point that weakens org-level impact.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sponsorship need","name":"What kind of sponsorship would help you take a more visible strategic position?","description":"Lets Toby name the support he needs without assuming the answer is confidence or capability.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoff choice","name":"What would you be willing to trade off to create room for stronger design leadership?","description":"Forces a real investment conversation about what must stop, slow, or shift to make the next level possible.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next commitment","name":"What would make the next two weeks a useful test of this growth contract?","description":"Closes on a concrete near-term experiment that makes the conversation actionable.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
